channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: This affordable misting fan is making WFH days bearable in spite of a heatwave — here's why I'd buy it right now
item.description: The Dreo Smart Misting Fan 516S is ideal for keeping cool during the scorching summer heat.

item.title: The best robot vacuum deals available during Prime Day
item.description: If you’ve been wanting to buy a robot vacuum but have been put off by how much it can cost to get a good one, now is not a bad time to start looking. Prime Day has kicked off, though more than just Amazon is offering deals on several models we’ve tested from brands like […]

item.title: Midea PortaSplit : pourquoi ce climatiseur mobile à split est en rupture partout
item.description: Le Midea PortaSplit cartonne au point d’être en rupture un peu partout. Derrière l’engouement, une vraie astuce technique : il colle la puissance d’un climatiseur fixe à la liberté d’un climatiseur mobile, sans travaux.

item.title: The ROG Raikiri II has become my go-to controller for good reason — and this Prime Day is the perfect time to add it to your team
item.description: This ROG pad has become my favorite controller for kicking back with my Xbox — from its dual-mode TMR triggers to its quick, clicky buttons, here are the reasons why I think it could become yours.

item.title: À quoi servent les batteries solaires, et sont-elles réellement rentables ?
item.description: Simple effet de mode, ou véritable utilité ? Si le marché des batteries est en pleine expansion, voyons ensemble à quoi ces batteries peuvent servir au quotidien, et si elles sont rentables.

item.title: Tracter une remorque et charger les vélos en voiture électrique sans exploser le budget : voici les modèles qui le font vraiment
item.description: Barres de toit, attelage, prix contenu : le triptyque idéal pour une voiture polyvalente sans exploser son budget. Mais dans l'univers électrique, trouver ce profil relève encore un peu du parcours du combattant, car ce genre de prestations est souvent associé aux SUV et grandes berlines. Pourtant, en cherchant un petit peu, il est possible de trouver certains modèles annoncés comme "accessibles" avec des barres de toit, un attelage et des capacités suffisantes pour s'en servir sans trop se poser de question. ...

item.title: US healthcare AI platform Xsolis confirms data breach that affects 1.4 million individuals
item.description: Social Security numbers and health insurance information nabbed as Xsolis tells its customers to be careful.

item.title: This iconic Paris landmark is now a ‘surreal’ homage to the material that built the city
item.description: The French artist JR took inspiration from an art work 40 years in the past to transform the famed 17th century bridge, Pont Neuf, into an ancient cave. The oldest bridge in Paris has a new look.

item.title: I've always owned physical books, but Amazon's standard Kindle takes away the inconvenience of traveling with multiple novels — and it's a great way to pass the time while soaking in the sun
item.description: Amazon's 2024 Kindle is its most basic e-reader, and now its most-affordable thanks to Prime Day.

item.title: Souveraineté tech : 80 % des Européens surveillent l’origine de leurs produits, la moitié rejette le « Made in USA »
item.description: Une enquête commandée par le fournisseur suisse Proton affirme que les Européens se méfient de plus en plus des géants technologiques américains. Les chiffres sont nets, mais la source a tout intérêt à ce qu’ils le soient.

item.title: Meta reportedly dips its pathetic toes into the prediction market space
item.description: Mark Zuckerberg has reportedly directed Meta to build its own prediction market.

item.title: Non, l’IA Mythos d’Anthropic n’a pas piraté la NSA : voici ce qui s’est vraiment passé
item.description: Une IA d’Anthropic aurait forcé les systèmes classifiés de la NSA en quelques heures. La phrase tourne en boucle sur les réseaux. Le problème : presque tout le monde l’a comprise de travers.

item.title: Netflix's new horror game taps into your phone for deeper immersion
item.description: Netflix's new horror game uses your smartphone to control stars Zoë Kravitz's hands.

item.title: World of ClaudeCraft : voici un MMORPG codé par IA pour 200 dollars qui compte déjà 25 000 joueurs actifs
item.description: Un MMORPG jouable bricolé en un week-end pour 200 dollars, grâce à une IA. Sauf que l’IA en question a été coupée par le gouvernement américain trois jours après sa sortie.

item.title: Formula E’s new season is starting to look more like F1
item.description: The next season of Formula E will feature a new race format and three new race locations when it starts in December to go with the new Gen4 electric cars. The schedule released today by the FIA includes the Circuit of the Americas in Austin, the Brands Hatch circuit in Kent, and the Zandvoort circuit […]

item.title: SpaceX stock drops Tuesday as tech stocks plunge: What could happen next.
item.description: SpaceX and other tech stocks continued to drop on Tuesday. Are investors starting to rethink their AI investments?

item.title: Skoda Peaq : le SUV électrique 7 places qui veut manger tout cru la Peugeot e-5008
item.description: Après l’Epiq, voici le Peaq… de l’entrée de gamme électrique au modèle le plus premium de Skoda, le grand écart est totalement assumé mais les deux modèles sont-ils vraiment si différents ?

item.title: The Pixel 10A finally costs what it should
item.description: We can usually rely on Google to put together a compelling package in its Pixel A-series devices. The Pixel 10A was kind of a letdown, though. It added only a handful of updates, like satellite messaging and updated Gorilla Glass on the screen — but it still costs $499, like the Pixel 9A. Kind of […]

item.title: Laptop prices suck these days, so here are some Prime Day deals that help a little
item.description: The RAM, storage, and component crunch has come for new laptop prices. Plenty of models have gone up in price after being on the market for months, and so have those that’ve been on shelves for over a year. Plus, many new models are releasing at higher prices than the previous generation. So, it really […]

item.title: Why corporate AI super PACs spent $27 million on a local election
item.description: Hello and welcome to Regulator, the newsletter for Verge subscribers chronicling the misadventures of their favorite tech overlords and Washington swamp creatures. ("Favorite" is, of course, subjective.) Not a subscriber yet? Sign up here, especially if you want the hot scoop on quality Amazon Prime Day deals recommended by the wonderful humans of The Verge's […]...

item.title: Anthropic’s Claude Tag is learning your company, one Slack message at a time
item.description: Anthropic’s new Claude Tag brings an always-on AI teammate to Slack. But beyond productivity, the feature is a strategic play to capture organizational context, institutional knowledge, and enterprise workflows.

item.title: The 3 JBL Bluetooth speakers I’d actually buy with my own money — I tested them all against their rivals, and these are the real winners for all budgets
item.description: These are the 3 JBL Bluetooth speakers I’d personally buy right now.

item.title: Ditch laggy screen-mirroring and get app-happy – Apple TV and Fire TV VPN apps will bring smoother streams to your World Cup watching
item.description: Screen mirroring can be laggy and annoying to set up – native VPN TV and media streamer apps are better for World Cup watching once you've got them up and running.

item.title: England vs Ghana: UK expats can stream the match on BBC iPlayer with NordVPN
item.description: Get UK shows and English sports commentary wherever you lay your hat (trick)

item.title: Sorry, Slackbot. Claude is taking your job
item.description: Anthropic has introduced @Claude for Slack.

item.title: Anthropic launches Claude Tag, replacing its Slack app with a persistent AI teammate that learns, monitors and works autonomously
item.description: Anthropic on Tuesday launched Claude Tag, a new product that embeds its most advanced AI model directly inside Slack as a persistent, shared teammate that anyone on a team can delegate work to by simply typing @Claude.The product, available today in beta for Claude Enterprise and Team customers, replaces Anthropic's existing Claude in Slack app and represents the company's most aggressive move yet to colonize the enterprise collaboration layer — the place where decisions get made, work gets assigned, and institutional knowledge accumulates in real time.For enterprise technology leaders who hav...

item.title: On est montés à bord du Skoda Peaq : voici ce que cache ce tout nouveau SUV électrique 7 places aux 640 km d’autonomie
item.description: Quelques semaines après le petit Epiq, Skoda lève le voile sur un tout nouveau modèle aux antipodes. Il s’agit du Peaq, qui prend la forme d’un grand SUV électrique sept places. Et nous avons pu le découvrir en avant-première.

item.title: Skoda Peaq : 640 kilomètres d’autonomie pour ce SUV électrique 7 places rival du Peugeot E-5008
item.description: Quelques semaines après l’Epiq, Skoda lève désormais le voile sur son tout nouveau SUV, le Peaq. Pouvant accueillir jusqu’à sept personnes à son bord, la voiture électrique arrive sur un segment de plus en plus concurrentiel.

item.title: These AR/XR glasses have hit a new low price - save almost $60 on the RayNeo Air 4 Pro
item.description: The RayNeo Air 4 Pro AR/XR glasses are 20% off and you'll be able to experience entertainment in a new way.

item.title: How to watch England vs Ghana: Free Streams, TV Channels & Kick-Off time as Harry Kane seeks more goals at the FIFA World Cup 2026
item.description: Here's how to watch England vs Ghana for free online and from anywhere in the FIFA World Cup 2026, as the Three Lions look to take control of Group L.

item.title: Samsung S90F vs. LG C5 OLED: Which OLED TV should you buy during Prime Day?
item.description: The LG C5 OLED TV is on sale for Prime Day, but so is one of our favorite Samsung OLED TVs. We compare these TVs head-to-head to find out.

item.title: Amazon Prime Day is here: We found 55+ deals on Apple, Sony, Ninja, and Lego favorites
item.description: Another Amazon mega sale is now live. Shop the best Prime Day deals on Sony headphones, Samsung TVs, Kindles, and Apple AirPods.

item.title: Zendure HEMS 2.0 : des utilisateurs de batteries solaires se retrouvent avec un système en panne après la mise à jour
item.description: Zendure a déployé sa grosse mise à jour HEMS 2.0, censée transformer ses batteries solaires en cerveau énergétique piloté par IA. Résultat sur le terrain : des installations à plusieurs milliers d’euros qui ne produisent plus rien.

item.title: 'The world's highest-fidelity movie player': Kaleidescape's new 'Cinematic 4K' format movie player gives us a glimpse of what could be next after 4K Blu-rays — and it's also the first 8K-certified movie player
item.description: Kaleidescape has launched the first 8K movie player to be certified by the 8K Association, but the new 4K Cinematic format may be the real star here

item.title: Amazon fait un grand déstockage pour son Prime Day : voici les meilleures offres en DIRECT
item.description: Amazon lance officiellement son Prime Day dès aujourd'hui et jusqu'à vendredi. Les offres sont nombreuses, mais nous faisons le tri en temps réel pour vous proposer uniquement les plus intéressantes.

item.title: GTA 6 : 3 questions à se poser pour préparer la précommande
item.description: Ce jeudi 25 juin s'ouvrent les précommandes du très attendu GTA 6. Édition, console, format : il y a plusieurs questions à se poser pour se préparer au mieux.

item.title: If you were on the fence about the Steam Machine, this RAM configuration twist might push you off it — straight into the build-your-own camp
item.description: 'This whole Steam Machine is the most depressing thing for me in the last 7 months. It's officially DOA': gamers hate the RAM configuration lottery with Valve's new PC.

item.title: Ne donnez plus vos surplus d’électricité à EDF grâce à cette batterie solaire Zendure en promo
item.description: Le gâchis de kilowatts gratuits pour le réseau, c'est fini. La batterie solaire tout-en-un Zendure SolarFlow 2400 AC+ s'affiche aujourd'hui à 1 079 euros au lieu de 1 279 euros chez Zendure.

item.title: New WhatsApp phishing campaign allows for remote access from a single business document
item.description: WhatsApp users are getting shady documents from their contacts, leading to an infection.

item.title: The best Apple deals you can get during Prime Day
item.description: Amazon’s Prime Day sale is here, and whether you’re looking for a new pair of wireless earbuds or a smartwatch, there’s a good chance you’ll find a discount. The Apple Watch Series 11 has already dropped to a new low price, while the AirPods Pro 3 recently hit a record-low $169 at Walmart. That particular […]

item.title: Warhammer 40,000 11th Edition is here, and as an ork player, these deals on the Armageddon boxed set are proving too tempting for me to resist
item.description: Has the new edition of Warhammer 40,000 got you itching to start playing? Amazon has a few great deals on the Armageddon boxed set, but they're selling fast.

item.title: Votre vieille carte AMD n’est peut-être pas aussi dépassée que vous le pensiez
item.description: AMD déploie son upscaling FSR 4.1 sur les Radeon RX 7000 via le pilote Adrenalin 26.6.2. Plus de 300 jeux compatibles, et les APU RDNA 3 des mini-PC et consoles portables suivront bientôt.

item.title: South Korea’s ‘dopamine sites’ let you shop, order food, and spend nothing
item.description: South Korea’s dopamine sites mimic online shopping and food delivery, letting users browse, order, and track fake purchases.

item.title: Steam Machine vs configuration PC à 1000 euros vs PS5 Pro : que faut il choisir ?
item.description: La Steam Machine se veut une porte d'entrée vers le monde du PC gamer. Est-ce qu'un PC monté soi-même est plus intéressant ? C'est tout l'enjeu de ce comparatif pour vous aider à faire le meilleur choix.

item.title: Secretlab baisse enfin le prix de sa référence assis-debout, le Magnus Pro
item.description: Le Secretlab Magnus Pro est l'un des meilleurs bureaux assis-debout motorisés du marché. Ce modèle premium perd aujourd'hui plus de 150 euros pour s'afficher à 883,15 euros au lieu de 1 039 euros sur Amazon.

item.title: Kylie Jenner Wearables? Hands-On With the New Meta Glasses
item.description: Meta is launching a new wave of smart glasses with updated designs, lower prices. Here's a hands-on look.

item.title: En plein Prime Day, cette offre concernant l’Apple Studio Display est immanquable
item.description: Avec sa dalle Retina 5K et ses excellentes couleurs, l'Apple Studio Display est prêt à en mettre plein la vue. Durant ce Prime Day, il est disponible à 1 249 euros.

item.title: Is ambition just insecurity in disguise?
item.description: The pros and cons of status anxiety. Spinoza, never one for flattery, defined ambition as the immoderate desire to make others approve of what we love and hate—in essence, an insatiable craving for other people’s validation. Today, that sounds like a brutal takedown of one of our most celebrated virtues. Ambition has become a word we wear proudly, the engine of LinkedIn bios and graduation speeches, the quality every hiring manager claims to want and every self-help book promises to unlock. And yet Spinoza, writing in the 17th century, was onto something that modern psychology has spent consid...

item.title: ‘Even if you know what you’re doing, everyone should use vibe coding’ – how a tech influencer got me excited about AI again
item.description: Is the MacBook Neo worth it for students? I spoke to a tech influencer who told me it’s all about vibe coding.

item.title: 95 Prime Day Deals on Gear We’ve Tested and Would Spend Our Own Money On
item.description: We've gone from A to Z to find Amazon's best Prime Day deals on the gear worth owning.

item.title: The Oura Ring Prime Day Sale I've Been Waiting For (2026)
item.description: Skip the pricey upgrade and save $100+ on the Oura Ring 4.

item.title: Oracle layoffs: 21,000 jobs cut, software giant trades human talent for AI tech amid the SaaSpocalypse
item.description: Oracle has decreased its workforce by tens of thousands in the past year, while spending $70 billion to fund its AI expansion. Oracle is spending big on AI, to the tune of $70 billion this year alone, in order to build data centers and AI-capable servers. But that AI expansion hasn’t come without a human cost.

item.title: iPhone Fold September debut looks increasingly likely, report reveals
item.description: Supply chain sources say component deliveries have begun, pushing back on analyst predictions of a delayed or December shipment date.

item.title: A Fitbit Air user has found out the hard way that the tracker doesn't mix well with one particular substance
item.description: If you're heading into the great outdoors with your Fitbit Air, maybe take heed of this tale of woe.

item.title: 'We really wanted the city to feel like a character in our game' — Gears of War: E-Day studio creative director says the game will make you 'care' about the city's fall through environmental storytelling
item.description: The Coalition wants players to "care" about Gears of War: E-Day's singular city location by deepening exploration and environmental storytelling.

item.title: Oracle admits it has cut 21,000 jobs, admits 'deployment of AI technologies across our operations have resulted, and may continue to result, in reductions to our workforce'
item.description: Oracle has laid off around 12,000 workers, and admits AI is partly to blame.

item.title: Influencers reportedly faked winning Polymarket bets
item.description: New investigation alleges Polymarket ran a mass marketing campaign using sponsored content featuring fake bets.

item.title: The best Prime Day deals under $50 worth shopping: Ninja blenders, Sony headphones, and Lego sets
item.description: The best Amazon Prime Day deals from Sony, Ninja, Lego, Coleman, and more are all under $50.

item.title: 15+ deals under $25 worth shopping on Prime Day: Apple AirTags, Soundcore earbuds, and more
item.description: Get an Amazon Fire Stick, Apple AirTag, Soundcore earbuds, Owala water bottle, or a Lego set for under $25 on Prime Day.

item.title: I almost bought the Amazon Fire Max 11 until I saw this much cheaper Lenovo tablet with better specs
item.description: The Amazon Fire Max 11 looks enticing, but after seeing the price of the Lenovo Idea Tab, which has been slashed to just £159.99 (was £219.99), we can't justify the buy.
